name: openrouter
description: OpenRouter API provider plugin for policy-routed review, second-opinion analysis, config/doc generation, and bounded OpenRouter execution across quality- and cost-ranked model slugs over one OpenAI-compatible endpoint. Powers the pipeline cascade's OpenRouter rail, generic review-agent runner, openrouter-exec runner, and dm-review external routing. Invoke with /openrouter for direct delegation.

skills.name: OpenRouter Delegation
skills.description: Delegate big-diff analysis, second-opinion review, and one-shot text generation to quality- and cost-ranked OpenRouter models. Use when offloading large-diff review or config/doc generation from Anthropic quota.

agents.name: OpenRouter Bulk Diff Analyst
agents.description: Policy-selected bulk and large-context diff analysis using GLM-5.2 with a DeepSeek V4 OpenRouter-model fallback; diffs above the truncation threshold are one trigger, not a requirement. Produces P1/P2/P3 findings for dm-review consolidation.

agents.name: OpenRouter Agent Runner
agents.description: Loads a trusted review-agent definition and runs its criteria through a policy-selected OpenRouter model slug with security filtering, refusal detection, and Codex fallback receipts.

commands.name: OpenRouter
commands.description: Direct OpenRouter invocation with model selection

interface.shortDescription: OpenRouter API provider plugin for policy-routed review, second-opinion analysis, config/doc generation, and bounded Ope
interface.longDescription: OpenRouter API provider plugin for policy-routed review, second-opinion analysis, config/doc generation, and bounded OpenRouter execution across quality- and cost-ranked model slugs over one OpenAI-compatible endpoint. Powers the pipeline cascade's OpenRouter rail, generic review-agent runner, openrouter-exec runner, and dm-review external routing. Invoke with /openrouter for direct delegation.
